title: Sooryavamsi
desc: The head of India's Anti-Terrorism Squad, Sooryavanshi, fights against all odds to take down a deadly terrorist group tied to his past.

title: Anjaan
desc: Krishna travels to Mumbai to look for his missing brother Raju. However, things take a turn when learns that Raju was a notorious gangster in the city.

title: Magic Oven
desc: A renowned chef shares and demonstrates the method to prepare various delicious recipes that can be easily made at home.

title: Vivegam
desc: Ajay Kumar, a former counter-terrorism agent, is called for a special mission. However, he is betrayed by his friends and is accused of extremely treasonous acts.

title: Nanban
desc: Two friends set out to find their friend from college, who taught them how to be more than just victims of circumstance. Along the way, they discover previously unknown truths.

title: Thalainagaram 2
desc: Right, a former gangster, swears off violence to become a real estate agent. However, he is forced to return to his old ways when three criminals try to frame him for a crime.
